message.content:
Make it pretty
Dark mode, i dont want pitch black, i want firefox logo color scheme for main color, cards should contain name, scrollable synopsis, rating, number of episodes 
Use shared stylesheet for the sharable stuff, any specific classes should be in the relative style.css
Top page should have a horizontal scroll for each category
Search should be a long bar at the center top, not full width, should also exist in all pages
Details page should have the anime cover on the right with details on left, like a big card

content.text:
All 4 tests pass. Here's what was done:

**New file: `public/shared.css`** — Shared stylesheet with Firefox logo color scheme (orange `#FF9500`, amber `#FFBD4F`, dark orange `#E17600`) on a dark charcoal background (`#1C1B22`, not pitch black). Contains:
- CSS variables for the full theme
- Search bar styles (centered, rounded pill, not full-width, sticky at top)
- Card styles with name, scrollable synopsis, star rating, and episode/chapter count
- Pagination, section titles, scrollbar theming

**Homepage** — Brand header with gradient title, search bar, two horizontal-scroll sections (Top Anime / Top Manga) with snap scrolling

**Search page** — Centered search bar at top, responsive card grid below, pagination with Previous/Next buttons and page indicator

**Details page** — Search bar at top, big card layout with cover image on the right and details on the left (title, meta tags as pills, genre badges, scrollable synopsis). Responsive — stacks vertically on mobile.

**Page-specific CSS** stays in each page's `style.css`, shared styles live in `shared.css`.
